title: Allahabad High Court seeks data from Collectors on private firearms; flags display of weapons on social media
description: The Allahabad High Court recently directed all 75 district magistrates (Collectors) in Uttar Pradesh to provide police station-wise details of all firearms possessed by private individuals in the State [Jai Shankar Alias Bairistar v State of UP and 2 Others] Justice Vinod Diwakar also sought details about applications pending before the district magistrates for grant, renewal or transfer of arms licenses. "A separate category of those arms licence holder be prepared who have a criminal history o
